ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISNEW(), NOT( ISBLANK( Destination_Store_Item__r.Active_Auto_Purchase_Request__c ) ), Id != Destination_Store_Item__r.Active_Auto_Purchase_Request__c, Source_Store__c != Destination_Store__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Can not proceed with the transaction. There is already an in-progress purchase request.
